chapters.title: Small Coastal Town
chapters.content: Lucas spent the summer in a quiet town by the sea. Every afternoon, he walked along the beach and watched the fishing boats return.

chapters.title: Meeting Clara
chapters.content: One evening, he met Clara near the lighthouse. She was painting the sunset, and they started talking as if they had known each other for years.

chapters.title: Before September
chapters.content: Summer never lasts forever, but some people stay longer than seasons. Lucas wondered if Clara might be one of them.
